name: j_hinglish_manager_lang
notes: VT-663 P1 validation — an ONBOARDED owner asks the MANAGER brain questions in romanized Hinglish (intra-sentence code-mixing, the surface Fazal's live drive hit: 'Mera top customer kaun hai?' answered in English). Surface: reply-language binding. Tier-1: no silent drop, no fabricated data. THE POINT (judge/eyeball, Tier-2): the manager MUST reply in Hinglish/Hindi — the owner's register — NOT switch them to English. Pre-P1 the soft 'mirror' prompt let the brain fall back to English intermittently; P1 makes the language instruction authoritative. Plain-chat path (no seeded data) so the count ask resolves to an honest not-connected answer.

persona.business: a small kirana and general store that runs on WhatsApp
persona.temperament: busy, friendly, mixes Hindi and English in one breath
persona.backstory: You run a neighbourhood store and you text the way you talk — Hindi and English mixed in the same sentence. You want to understand what this Team assistant can do for you.

persona_turn.goal: Hinglish mein (Hindi + English mix, ek hi sentence mein) greet karke poochho ki ye Team assistant marketing mein exactly kaise help karta hai

steps.fallback_message: Hey good morning! Aaj bahut kaam hai, but ek cheez pucchna tha — ye Team wala thing marketing mein exactly kaise help karega mujhe?
steps.note: Intra-sentence code-mixed capability question. Expect a real, register-appropriate answer IN HINGLISH — never an English-only reply.

persona_turn.goal: Hinglish mein poochho ki apne customers ka count/status dekh sakte ho kya (koi data abhi connected nahi hai)

steps.fallback_message: Theek hai got it, thanks yaar. Waise mujhe abhi customer count wagera dekhna hai — aap dikha sakte ho?
steps.note: Code-mixed status ask with no data connected. NOTE (VT-663 P2 finding): the DETERMINISTIC status-net (owner_inputs/status_query.py:586) emits a hardcoded ENGLISH 'You currently have N customers in your ledger' regardless of owner language — P1 (brain-prompt binding) does NOT reach this deterministic net. P2 must language-bind the deterministic answer nets (not just Meta templates). Left un-asserted here because that copy is the ruled §2 2026-07-10 anti-hijack string; the language gap is tracked to P2, not a P1 failure.
